title: proofbundle v0.1
description: A portable cryptographic evidence bundle: an Ed25519-signed, RFC 6962 Merkle-anchored payload, optionally carrying an SD-JWT selective-disclosure credential.

payload_b64.description: Base64-encoded payload. The verifier treats it as opaque bytes.

hash_alg.description: RFC 6962 / RFC 9162 SHA-256 tree hashing. REQUIRED (SPEC.md §5) — no `default`: a verifier MUST NOT silently supply this value when the field is absent.

inclusion_proof_b64.description: Sibling hashes of the RFC 6962 inclusion proof, base64-encoded, leaf-to-root order.

compact.description: The SD-JWT in compact serialization (issuer-signed JWT plus ~-separated disclosures).

issuer_public_key_b64.description: Optional issuer Ed25519 public key; if present the verifier checks the issuer signature.
